title: Jellyflow Conformance Fixtures v1
problem: Jellyflow needs a stable headless conformance fixture format and runner so adapters and agents can reuse the same XyFlow-feel behavior checks instead of duplicating private harness logic.

evidence.summary: Opened the conformance fixtures workstream from interaction harness and node drag closeout follow-ons, with ADR 0003 renderer-free testing constraints.
Added public runtime::conformance fixture vocabulary for setup, actions, gestures, and normalized traces, with serde-friendly payloads and public surface coverage.
Added the headless conformance runner with normalized trace recording, compact mismatches, and tests for graph commit, gesture, callback trace, and mismatch output.
Converted connect dispatch, connect gesture, and node drag adapter-conformance trace scenarios to run through the conformance fixture runner.
Documented fixture conformance before renderer smoke tests, recorded closeout evidence, and closed the workstream.

continue_policy.notes: Workstream closed. Follow-ons: file-backed golden fixtures, adapter runner helpers, broader gesture families, and renderer smoke tests outside jellyflow-runtime.
